verse_text: Then the Lord spoke to Gad, David's seer, saying,

links.context: Gad the prophet (see 1Kg 22:5; [[1CH.21:9]]ff; [[2CH.29:25]]) gives David a choice of one of three penalties for taking the census: (1) three years of famine; (2) three months of flight from enemies; (3) three days of death in the land. David chooses the third, and a plague afflicts Israel from Dan to Beersheba. At the point of the destruction of Jerusalem, God says enough! David beseeches the angel to afflict him and his father's house, but not his sheep, the flock of Israel.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
